questions.question: When do hikes usually takes place?
questions.answer:
We try to organize at least one hike on the first weekend of every month (usually the Sunday).

For the summer semester 2026, the planned dates are the following: 12.04 (after the retakes), 01.05, 07.06, 05.07.

Additionally, we also organize more spontaneous hikes throughout the semester (especially in the summer months).

questions.question: When will I get more information about next hike?
questions.answer:
We communicate the details of the hikes (e.g. meeting time, location, difficulty level, etc.) when the registration opens.

For the first weekend of the month hikes (dates above), we open the registration about 2–3 weeks before. For the other hikes, we try to do so at least a week before.

We announce the opening of the registration on Instagram, WhatsApp and in our newsletter (coming soon).

questions.question: How to stay updated about the hikes?
questions.answer:
The best way to stay updated about our hikes is to follow us on Instagram and subscribe to our newsletter (coming soon). We also post updates and announcements in our WhatsApp group.

Additionally, you can check our website regularly for the latest information about upcoming hikes and any changes to the schedule.

questions.question: What should I expect from the hikes?
questions.answer:
Our hikes are designed to be enjoyable and inclusive for people of all fitness levels and hiking experience. Some hikes are more challenging than others, but we always provide detailed information about the difficulty level and what to expect so that you can choose the hike that best suits your preferences and abilities.

We don't know in advance the exact route and conditions of the hikes, therefore you might encounter small obstacles (e.g. muddy paths, tree to step over, big steps, etc.) that can make the hike more challenging. However, we always try to choose routes that are safe and manageable for everyone.

You can expect to spend a day in nature, enjoying beautiful scenery, fresh air, and good company. Our hikes are not just about physical activity, but also about socializing and having fun. We encourage everyone to take their time, enjoy the surroundings, and connect with fellow hikers.

questions.question: Who can join the hikes?
questions.answer:
Every TUM student and employee is welcome to join our hikes, regardless of their hiking experience or fitness level.

Other people are also welcome to join but with express approval of the hike organizers. Please send us a message on Instagram or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com.

questions.question: I'm not a sports person, can I still join the hikes?
questions.answer:
Of course! Our hikes are designed to be inclusive and enjoyable for people of all fitness levels and hiking experience.

We offer a variety of hikes with different difficulty levels, so you can choose the one that best suits your preferences and abilities.

Additionally, our hikes are not just about physical activity, but also about enjoying nature, socializing and having fun.

questions.question: Do I need to be a member of the hiking club to join the hikes?
questions.answer:
Some of our hikes are reserved for members of the hiking club, while others are open to all TUM students and employees.

You become a member of the hiking club after completing a first hike with us.

questions.question: Do I need to register for the hikes?
questions.answer:
Registration is only mandatory for specific hikes, which we announce in advance. For the other hikes, you can just show up at the meeting point on the day of the hike.

However, we highly recommend registering for all hikes, as it helps us to plan accordingly and to keep you updated in case of any short-notice changes.

questions.question: How do you go and come back from the hikes?
questions.answer:
We usually meet at Heilbronn Hauptbahnhof (main train station) and take local public transportation (train, bus) to and from the hiking location.

The journey is included in the Deutschland-ticket. If you don't have one, the cheapest option is to buy a one day group ticket.

questions.question: Can I join only for a part of the hike?
questions.answer:
You can leave us at any point during the hike, but we ask you to inform the hike organizers in advance if you plan to do so. Usually, our hikes have multiple "exit points" where you can leave the hike and take public transportation back. However, from the exit point, you are responsible to find your way back. Beware that the shortest path on the map might be a steep and difficult descent.

Joining during the hike is not possible, unless express approval from the hike organizers. Please send us a message before the hike on Instagram, WhatsApp or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com.

questions.question: Do I need to pay to join the hikes?
questions.answer: No, our hikes are completely free for all participants. However, you are responsible to cover all transportation costs and personal expenses (e.g. food, drinks, etc.) during the hike.

questions.question: What should I consider before joining a hike?
questions.answer:
Before joining a hike, it's important to consider the following:

  • Make sure you are physically prepared for the hike, especially if it is a more challenging route. It's always a good idea to start with easier hikes and gradually work your way up.
  • Check our website or social media channels the morning of the hike for any last-minute changes.
  • Check the weather forecast (of the hiking location) and dress accordingly.
  • Bring enough water and snacks to keep you energized during the hike.
  • Be respectful of nature and other hikers. Stay on designated trails, pack out all trash, and be mindful of noise levels.

questions.question: What do I need to bring for the hikes?
questions.answer:
You don't need to bring any special equipment for our hikes, but we recommend bringing some basic items to ensure a comfortable and enjoyable experience:

  • Comfortable hiking shoes or a good pair of sneakers (that you don't mind getting dirty)
  • Weather-appropriate clothing and accessories (e.g. rain jacket, hat, sunglasses, sunscreen, etc.)
  • A backpack to carry your belongings
  • Water and snacks for the hike

questions.question: How long do the hikes usually last?
questions.answer:
Hiking is a time-consuming activity, and the duration of our hikes can vary greatly depending on the route, distance, and difficulty level.

On average, our hikes last between 4 to 6 hours, including breaks. With transportation, this sums up to a full day.

We start early in the morning from Heilbronn and return in the late afternoon/evening.

questions.question: How to be updated in case of changes?
questions.answer:
Every hike is subject to short notice changes, especially due to bad weather or transport disruptions.

We try to inform you as soon as possible in case of any changes, by updating the hike information on our website and posting an update on Instagram.

When registering, you can also choose to receive an email notification in case of any changes. We highly recommend doing so, as it is the most reliable way to get informed about any changes.

questions.question: I don't live in Heilbronn, can I still join the hikes?
questions.answer:
Yes, you can still join our hikes directly from another city. However, you will need to plan your transportation accordingly to ensure that you can join us at the hiking location (or at specific stops during the journey) on time.

Please send us a message on Instagram, WhatsApp or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com so we can better coordinate in advance.

questions.question: How do you choose the hiking routes?
questions.answer:
We choose our hiking routes based on a variety of factors, including the scenic beauty, accessibility, and suitability for different fitness levels.

We also take into account the feedback and suggestions from our members to ensure that we are offering hikes that everyone can enjoy.

questions.question: Can I suggest a hiking route?
questions.answer:
Absolutely! We welcome suggestions for hiking routes from our members. If you have a route in mind that you think would be great for a hike, please feel free to share it with us.

You can send us a message on Instagram or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com. We will consider all suggestions and try to incorporate them into our future hike plans.

questions.question: Do you organize multi-day hikes?
questions.answer:
Currently, we focus on organizing day hikes that can be completed within a single day. However, we are looking into organizing multi-day hikes in the near future if there is enough interest from our members.

If you would be interested in participating in such events, please let us know by sending us a message on Instagram, WhatsApp or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com.

questions.question: Can I volunteer to help organize the hikes?
questions.answer: Yes, we are always looking for volunteers to help us organize and lead our hikes. If you are interested in volunteering, please send us a message on Instagram, WhatsApp or an email at contact@tumhikingclub.com.
